name: gitlab-review
description: Race-safe GitLab merge request review response with complete discussion inventory, reviewer-owned resolution, idempotent replies, and exact-head handoff proof.

interface.shortDescription: Address MR feedback on one proven head.
interface.longDescription: A cross-agent GitLab merge request review-response plugin that freezes a complete review epoch, classifies current feedback against current code, guards against concurrent pushes and reviewer edits, preserves reviewer-owned thread resolution, deduplicates replies, and binds final CI and discussion evidence to the exact pushed head.
capabilities: Complete paginated GitLab merge request discussion inventory
Immutable head, diff-version, note, and resolution race guards
Idempotent same-thread evidence replies with ambiguous-write readback
Human reviewer-owned resolution with explicit authorization gates
Exact local, remote, merge-request, pipeline, and final-discussion handoff proof
interface.defaultPrompt: Address the unresolved feedback on this GitLab merge request and prove the result against the exact current head.
